---
applyTo: "skills/**/*.md,skills/**/agents/*.yaml"
---

When editing files under `skills/`:

- Preserve the canonical skill structure.
- Keep `SKILL.md` short and workflow-oriented.
- Keep `references/` as the place for long-form detail.
- Do not move tool-specific wrappers into the canonical skill unless portability would improve.
- Avoid adding unnecessary files such as changelogs, quick-reference docs, or installation guides inside an individual skill directory.
- If you change a skill workflow, update any matching templates or metadata in the same skill.
